DISCOVERY 612, NO APPEARANCES. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO COMPEL RESPONSES TO DISCOVERY AND FOR AN AWARD OF SANCTIONS IS ORDERED OFF CALENDAR. A DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WAS FILED ON JANUARY 31, 2006. ADDITIONALLY, THE PROOF OF SERVICE IS INADEQUATE. A HEARSAY PROOF OF PERSONAL SERVICE IS NOT COMPETENT EVIDENCE THAT THE MOTION WAS SERVED. THE PROOF OF PERSONAL SERVICE MUST BE SIGNED BY THE PERSON WHO ACTUALLY SERVED THE MOTION. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT

MOTION TO COMPEL ANSWERS TO INTERROGATORIES
Off Calendar Feb-07-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Defendant's Motion To Compel Responses To Discovery And For An Award Of Sanctions is ordered off calendar. A dismissal of the entire action was filed on January 31, 2006. Additionally, the proof of service is inadequate. A hearsay proof of personal service is not competent evidence that the motion was served. The proof of personal service must be signed by the person who actually served the motion. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT
